nasb.text: And He began to teach them that the Son of Man must suffer many things and be rejected by the elders and the chief priests and the scribes, and be killed, and after three days rise again.

esv.text: And he began to teach them that the Son of Man must suffer many things and be rejected by the elders and the chief priests and the scribes and be killed, and after three days rise again.

cnv.text: 於是他教導他們，人子必須受許多苦，被長老、祭司長和經學家棄絕、殺害，三天後復活。

ccb.text: 从此，耶稣便告诉他们，人子必须受许多苦，被长老、祭司长和律法教师弃绝，杀害，但必在三天之后复活。

csbs.text: 耶稣开始教导他们说：“人子必须受很多苦害，被长老们、祭司长们和经文士们弃绝，并且被杀，然后在第三天要复活。”
